narrative:
Stephen Eustáquio is a pivotal Central Midfield player for Portugal. His impressive overall rating of 7.34/10 places him among the top 1% of central midfields at this tournament. This high rating is derived from both his strong club form over the last two seasons and his current World Cup performances.

Evidence highlights Eustáquio's dual threat as a creator and ball-winner. He averages 2.762 key passes and 0.361 expected assists per 90 minutes at this World Cup. Defensively, he contributes significantly with 2.532 tackles per 90 minutes, though his attacking output is modest, with only 0.036 expected goals and 0.691 shots per 90 minutes.

Eustáquio serves as a critical engine in Portugal's midfield, orchestrating attacks and disrupting opponents. Scouts and fans should continue to observe his exceptional ability to create opportunities for teammates and his consistent defensive work rate. His evolving role in the team will be key to Portugal's success in their remaining matches.
